channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Launches Massive Drone and Missile Attack on Ukraine, Killing 16
item.description: Russian forces targeted civilian areas across Ukraine with nearly 700 drones and dozens of ballistic and cruise missiles in the worst aerial attack in weeks. Ukrainian officials acknowledged interceptor stockpiles are running critically low.

item.title: 🕊️ Key Takeaways After Iran-US-Israel Ceasefire Reached
item.description: A tentative two-week ceasefire has paused hostilities between Iran, Israel, and the United States, but significant challenges remain for a permanent deal. Major differences persist between Trump and Iran's surviving leaders following Khamenei's death.

item.title: ⚖️ Trump Global Tariffs Face Fresh Legal Challenge in Trade Court
item.description: Trump's temporary global import tariffs are under renewed legal assault in the U.S. Court of International Trade after the Supreme Court struck down his broader IEEPA-based tariffs in February.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Europe Accelerates NATO Fallback Plan in Case of US Withdrawal
item.description: European officials are advancing contingency plans dubbed "European NATO" to preserve defense capabilities if the U.S. pulls out. Germany, previously opposed to go-it-alone approaches, has now signed on.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskyy Seeks More Arms Deals With European Allies
item.description: Ukraine's president is visiting three European capitals in 48 hours to secure military and financial support. Germany agreed to a 4 billion euro defense package while Norway pledged 9 billion euros in assistance.

item.title: 🇮🇹 Italy Summons Russian Ambassador Over TV Host Insults to PM Meloni
item.description: Italy's foreign ministry summoned Russia's ambassador after a state TV host made derogatory remarks about Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni during a broadcast, escalating diplomatic tensions.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Flexes Energy Leverage as Philippines-US Start War Games
item.description: China is exercising its energy leverage in the South China Sea as the Philippines and United States begin annual military exercises, highlighting escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 💰 Iran War May Crush Oil Demand Today, Send It Soaring Long-Term
item.description: Analysts warn the Iran conflict could suppress global oil demand in the short term while driving prices higher over the long haul due to supply disruptions and market uncertainty.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea's Lee Meets Vietnam's Lam in Hanoi
item.description: South Korean President Lee Jae-myung held talks with Vietnam's leadership in Hanoi, strengthening bilateral ties and discussing regional cooperation amid shifting geopolitical dynamics.

item.title: 🏛️ Cyprus Calls for EU Defense Integration Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: Cyprus urged stronger EU defense coordination citing its strategic position near the Middle East and growing regional instability from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🛢️ Iran's Covert Oil Trade Persists Despite US Blockade
item.description: Despite the US naval blockade, Iran's clandestine oil exports continue through smuggling networks and alternative routes, sustaining revenue for the regime.

item.title: ⚔️ Iran's IRGC Says It Remains at Peak Readiness
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps declared it maintains maximum military readiness despite the ceasefire, warning of swift response to any renewed aggression.

item.title: 🇮🇹 Italy Summons Russian Ambassador Over TV Host Insults
item.description: Italy summoned Russia's ambassador after a state TV presenter made offensive remarks about Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni, marking a new low in diplomatic relations.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan's Double Game as Asim Munir Visits US for Talks
item.description: Pakistan's military chief visits Washington amid accusations Islamabad is playing both sides in the Iran conflict while seeking US support.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Inflation Jumps Amid Iran War Pressures
item.description: UK inflation has risen sharply as energy market disruptions from the Iran conflict ripple through the British economy, complicating fiscal policy.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese Navy Passes by Japanese Islands Again After Pacific Training
item.description: Chinese naval vessels transited near Japanese islands following Pacific training exercises, raising Tokyo's concerns about Beijing's expanding naval operations.

item.title: ⛪ Pope in Africa Highlights Prison and Human Rights Issues
item.description: Pope Francis visited African nations to highlight prison conditions and human rights issues, calling for humanitarian treatment in detention facilities.

item.title: 🏛️ Fed Chair Pick Warsh Makes Case for Smaller Fed Holdings
item.description: Trump's nominee for Federal Reserve chair advocated for reducing the central bank's balance sheet during confirmation hearings, signaling a shift in monetary policy direction.

item.title: 🕊️ US-Iran Ceasefire Deadline Extended as Talks Continue
item.description: The fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran was extended beyond April 22 as diplomatic efforts continue in Islamabad and regional capitals.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Has Taken 1,700 Square km of Ukraine This Year, General Says
item.description: Russia's top general claimed territorial gains of 1,700 square kilometers in Ukraine so far this year, though analysts question the strategic value of the advances.

item.title: 🏛️ NATO Criticises Russian, Chinese Nuclear Stances, Urges Cooperation With US
item.description: NATO allies criticized Russia and China's nuclear postures while calling for renewed arms control cooperation with the United States.

item.title: 🇨🇳 US Commander Warns Taiwan Against "Starving Chicken" Defense
item.description: A senior US military commander cautioned Taiwan against a passive defense posture, urging more aggressive preparation for potential Chinese aggression.

item.title: 🇳🇱 Dutch Intelligence Agency: Europe Should Focus on Own Security as Global Threats Mount
item.description: The Netherlands' intelligence chief warned Europe must prioritize its own defense capabilities amid mounting global threats and uncertain US commitment.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Shifting Saudi Ties: What Role Could China Take After Iran War?
item.description: As the Iran conflict reshapes regional dynamics, questions emerge about China's expanding role in Saudi Arabia and the broader Middle East.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistanis Blame US Blockade, Not Iran Divisions, for Stalled Talks
item.description: Pakistani sources point to the US naval blockade rather than internal Iranian divisions as the main obstacle to progressing ceasefire negotiations.
